mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mag_task (project_id, module_id, title, description, state, assignee_agent_id, reporter_agent_id, requirement_ref, temporal_workflow_id, block_reason, blocked_by_agent_id, row_version) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{moduleId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{state}, #{assigneeAgentId}, #{reporterAgentId}, #{requirementRef}, #{temporalWorkflowId}, #{blockReason}, #{blockedByAgentId}, #{rowVersion})
mapper.update: UPDATE mag_task SET module_id = #{moduleId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, state = #{state}, assignee_agent_id = #{assigneeAgentId}, reporter_agent_id = #{reporterAgentId}, requirement_ref = #{requirementRef}, temporal_workflow_id = #{temporalWorkflowId}, block_reason = #{blockReason}, blocked_by_agent_id = #{blockedByAgentId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mag_task SET state = #{state}, row_version = row_version + 1, temporal_workflow_id = #{temporalWorkflowId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND row_version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mag_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT state AS state, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM mag_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY state
